subject: ap-world-history
title: Short Answer Question — AP World History

parts.prompt: Identify ONE continuity in the political system of China in the period 1200–1750.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Historically defensible response addressing the prompt.

parts.prompt: Identify ONE change in the political system of China in the period 1200–1750.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Historically defensible response addressing the prompt.

parts.prompt:
Explain ONE way in which political continuities in China influenced the development of the global economy
in the period 1200–1750.
Answer all parts of the question that follows.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Historically defensible response addressing the prompt.
